summary: Tested 2 new WMS features: (1) SKU Auto-generation in Receiving form - when Style/Color/Size are filled, SKU field auto-populates in STYLE-COLOR-SIZE format (uppercase), field is read-only. (2) Cycle Count module - full CRUD, progress tracking, approval workflow. Backend tests: 24 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend tests: All verified working.

critical_code_review_comments: SKU auto-generation logic at WMS.js lines 86-94 correctly uses useEffect with form.style, form.color, form.size dependencies
Backend /api/wms/generate-sku endpoint (lines 1242-1253) matches frontend logic exactly
Backend /api/wms/receiving (lines 66-194) auto-generates SKU if not provided, reuses existing if present
CycleCountModule (lines 1453-1712) properly implements list, create form, and detail counting interface
MODULE_COMPONENTS mapping at line 1715-1726 includes cycle_count: CycleCountModule
Cycle count detail view groups items by inv_location and shows discrepancies with color coding

success_rate.backend: 100% (24/24 passed, 1 skipped due to no completed counts)

seed_data_creation: Test receiving entries created: TEST_AutoSKU, TEST_StyleOnly, TEST_CustomSKU
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 tests 2 new WMS features: (1) SKU Auto-generation in Receiving - useEffect triggers on style/color/size changes, generates STYLE-COLOR-SIZE format in uppercase. Field has readOnly attribute and cursor-not-allowed styling. (2) Cycle Count module - Full implementation at /api/wms/cycle-counts endpoints. CycleCountModule component handles list, create, detail views. Existing cycle counts: TEST_Count_RP10 (in_progress with 767 items), Test Count RP10 (pending with 767 items). The approve endpoint requires status='completed' which requires all lines to be counted.
